summary: Fixed 15 of 20 findings: 2 high-severity unguarded JSON.parse, 3 missing ErrorBoundaries, 1 event listener leak, 1 infinite retry loop, and 8 silent catch patterns. 5 findings deferred (duplicate code consolidation Q3-04/Q3-05, Q3-06 handled by DX fixer, ThemeManager Q3-18 low-priority singleton, nested setTimeout Q3-20 needs design review).

fixes.description: Wrapped desktop Sidebar in ErrorBoundary with fallback message in AppLayout.tsx
Wrapped TaskDetailPanel in ErrorBoundary in AppLayout.tsx
Wrapped AIChatPanel in ErrorBoundary with chat-specific fallback in AIChat.tsx
LIST_PREFIX regex dedup — low risk, deferred to avoid scope creep
fetchWithTimeout dedup — low risk, deferred to avoid scope creep
DX fixer already migrated src/ai/chat.ts and src/ui/api/ai/ai-sessions.ts to use deserializeChatMessages(). src/api/ai.ts also already migrated.
src/ai/chat.ts already uses deserializeChatMessages() which has try-catch. Also wrapped JSON.parse in vite-api-routes/ai.ts in try-catch with fallback to undefined.
src/ui/api/ai/ai-sessions.ts already uses deserializeChatMessages() which has try-catch. No additional fix needed.
Replaced addEventListener with named changeHandler function and removeEventListener in cleanup
Replaced .catch(() => {}) with .catch(err => console.warn(...))
Replaced .catch(() => {}) with .catch(err => console.warn(...))
Replaced .catch(() => {}) with .catch(err => console.warn(...))

Added console.warn for DailyBriefingSection and CustomInstructionsSection settings load failures
ThemeManager singleton listener cleanup — no practical leak risk, deferred
Added MAX_RETRIES=10 with exponential backoff (1s, 2s, 4s, ..., 16s cap) and error message when limit reached
Nested setTimeout in useAIMessageActions — needs design review for proper useEffect-based state sync
